Edit image 1.

On the right side, replace the red Toyota Supra toy car with the Infiniti QX50 (2016) from image 3. The replaced Infiniti QX50 should retain the exact same scale, angle, and position as the original Supra toy car in image 1, rendered as a matching toy car model.

- Replace the car thumbnail image on the box with the Infiniti QX50 (2016) from image 3, depicted as a toy car thumbnail consistent with the visual style of the car on the box in image 2.
- Change the large number '73' visible on the box (referencing image 2) to '50'.
